description.value: You spread the strain of your fall throughout your large build, cushioning the impact. Treat falls as 20 feet shorter. If you're an expert in Athletics, treat falls as 50 feet shorter, and 100 feet if you're a master. If you're legendary in Athletics, you always land on your feet and don't take damage, regardless of the distance of the fall. If you land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone], you also land in quadrupedal posture regardless of your posture at the beginning of the fall and drop anything you were holding in your middle arms, unless you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Galloping Grip] or another ability that allows you to hold objects in quadrupedal form.
